List of articles
===

[The intersect3 problem](https://algorithmx.github.io/intersect3/)

[Monotone subsequence](https://algorithmx.github.io/monotone/)


About me
===

I am a blogger, programmer with a PhD in condensed matter physics. 
The topics of this blog include physics, math, finance, programming and music. 
The quality of the blog posts is guaranteed to be satisfactory for course assignments. 
Challenges to my posts are welcome, especially on faster algorithms.
